actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && nmcli networking on || nmcli networking off'
actions.update-command: sh -c '[[ $(nmcli networking) == *enabled* ]] && echo true || echo false'

actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && pactl set-source-mute @DEFAULT_SOURCE@ 1 || pactl set-source-mute @DEFAULT_SOURCE@ 0'
actions.update-command: sh -c '[[ $(pactl get-source-mute @DEFAULT_SOURCE@) == *yes* ]] && echo true || echo false'

actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && (nmcli networking off; rfkill block bluetooth) || (nmcli networking on; rfkill unblock bluetooth)'
actions.update-command: sh -c '[[ $(nmcli networking) == *disabled* ]] && rfkill list bluetooth | grep -q Soft.blocked:.yes && echo true || echo false'

actions.command: sh -c 'if pgrep hyprsunset; then pkill hyprsunset; else hyprsunset --temperature 5000K; fi'
actions.update-command: sh -c 'pgrep hyprsunset > /dev/null && echo true || echo false'
